# Rows4

## Tags
lines, list, queue, preview, paragraphs, parallel, series, split, vertical, horizontal, half, center, middle, even, drawers, grill

## Categories
layout, design, text

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/rows-4)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Rows4;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Rows4 { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
